## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between SmithAI and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, design resources, and AI implementation.](https://fathom.video/share/-8-psLFRiisy7pfBKVKqo3Z6bo2Ca-yk?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SmithAI is onboarding a new design agency (Onbox) to enhance graphic elements and illustrations for content](https://fathom.video/share/-8-psLFRiisy7pfBKVKqo3Z6bo2Ca-yk?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)
  - [Exploring mid-journey AI for image generation, with guidance on maintaining brand consistency](https://fathom.video/share/-8-psLFRiisy7pfBKVKqo3Z6bo2Ca-yk?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Transitioning from "Voice Assistant" to "AI Receptionist" as the official product name](https://fathom.video/share/-8-psLFRiisy7pfBKVKqo3Z6bo2Ca-yk?tab=summary&timestamp=1829.0)
  - [Focus on creating high-quality, detailed content for flagship topics, especially AI-related articles](https://fathom.video/share/-8-psLFRiisy7pfBKVKqo3Z6bo2Ca-yk?tab=summary&timestamp=1628.0)

## Topics

### Design Resources and Strategy

  - [SmithAI retaining new agency (Onbox) for enhanced graphic work](https://fathom.video/share/-8-psLFRiisy7pfBKVKqo3Z6bo2Ca-yk?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)
  - [Kick-off call scheduled for next week](https://fathom.video/share/-8-psLFRiisy7pfBKVKqo3Z6bo2Ca-yk?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
  - [Exploring mid-journey AI for image generation with brand consistency](https://fathom.video/share/-8-psLFRiisy7pfBKVKqo3Z6bo2Ca-yk?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Maddy to share Smith AI illustrations and graphics via Figma for reference](https://fathom.video/share/-8-psLFRiisy7pfBKVKqo3Z6bo2Ca-yk?tab=summary&timestamp=827.0)
  - [Aim to create a formal style guide without slowing down content production](https://fathom.video/share/-8-psLFRiisy7pfBKVKqo3Z6bo2Ca-yk?tab=summary&timestamp=573.0)

### Content Creation and Improvement

  - [Team to generate multiple article drafts for broader feedback](https://fathom.video/share/-8-psLFRiisy7pfBKVKqo3Z6bo2Ca-yk?tab=summary&timestamp=911.0)
  - [Implement suggestions and improvements with each iteration](https://fathom.video/share/-8-psLFRiisy7pfBKVKqo3Z6bo2Ca-yk?tab=summary&timestamp=929.0)
  - [Add context at the top of drafts: primary keyword, top 3 adjacent keywords, search volume, and brief summary](https://fathom.video/share/-8-psLFRiisy7pfBKVKqo3Z6bo2Ca-yk?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Enhance articles with more visual elements: graphics, comparison tables, diagrams](https://fathom.video/share/-8-psLFRiisy7pfBKVKqo3Z6bo2Ca-yk?tab=summary&timestamp=1528.0)
  - [Focus on creating high-quality, detailed content for flagship topics (e.g., AI-related articles)](https://fathom.video/share/-8-psLFRiisy7pfBKVKqo3Z6bo2Ca-yk?tab=summary&timestamp=1623.0)
  - [Ensure proper definition and use of acronyms (e.g., SMB) throughout content](https://fathom.video/share/-8-psLFRiisy7pfBKVKqo3Z6bo2Ca-yk?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)

### AI Implementation in Content

  - [Explore using AI (e.g., mid-journey, ChatGPT) for creating tables, text boxes, and simple graphics](https://fathom.video/share/-8-psLFRiisy7pfBKVKqo3Z6bo2Ca-yk?tab=summary&timestamp=1148.0)
  - [Preference for image files over HTML for better social sharing](https://fathom.video/share/-8-psLFRiisy7pfBKVKqo3Z6bo2Ca-yk?tab=summary&timestamp=1224.0)
  - [Aim for square images (1:1 aspect ratio) for versatile use across platforms](https://fathom.video/share/-8-psLFRiisy7pfBKVKqo3Z6bo2Ca-yk?tab=summary&timestamp=1265.0)

### Product Updates

  - [Officially changing "Voice Assistant" to "AI Receptionist"](https://fathom.video/share/-8-psLFRiisy7pfBKVKqo3Z6bo2Ca-yk?tab=summary&timestamp=1829.0)

## Next Steps

  - Review new set of topic clusters sent by Elvis
  - [Experiment with mid-journey AI for image generation and gather feedback](https://fathom.video/share/-8-psLFRiisy7pfBKVKqo3Z6bo2Ca-yk?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - Schedule CMS training session with Jessica for content posting
  - [Implement feedback on article structure, depth, and visual elements in future drafts](https://fathom.video/share/-8-psLFRiisy7pfBKVKqo3Z6bo2Ca-yk?tab=summary&timestamp=1623.0)
  - [Update brand guidelines to reflect new product name: "AI Receptionist"](https://fathom.video/share/-8-psLFRiisy7pfBKVKqo3Z6bo2Ca-yk?tab=summary&timestamp=1829.0)
